rules.title: Network IOC Detection [861fa37db1d5]
rules.content:
title: CDB SENTINEL APEX - Network Threat Intel [861fa37db1d5]
id: cdb-net-861fa37db1d5
status: production
description: >
    Auto-generated detection rule for 21 malicious IPs and 51 malicious domains
    from CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX threat intelligence feeds.
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX v51
date: 2026-04-28
modified: 2026-04-28
tags:
    - attack.command_and_control
    - attack.t1071
    - attack.t1090
logsource:
    category: firewall
    product: any
detection:
    selection:
        DestinationIp:
            - '13.5.2.1'
            - '7.8.10.2'
            - '45.8.0.2'
            - '48.8.0.4'
            - '51.7.0.77'

            - 'corporate.spicejet.com'
            - 'documentation.wazuh.com'

            - 'api.first.org'

            - 'research.jfrog.com'

            - 'www.docker.com'

            - 'www.esecurityplanet.com'
            - 'www.helpnetsecurity.com'
            - 'www.mend.io'
            - 'go.recordedfuture.com'
            - 'pdfl.io'
            - 'support.industry.siemens.com'
            - 'www.siemens.com'
            - 'file.io'
            - 'accuvant.com'
            - 'docs.metasploit.com'
            - 'gmail.com'
            - 'api.cyberdudebivash.com'
            - 'blog.cyberdudebivash.com'
            - 'cyberdudebivash.com'
            - 'intel.cyberdudebivash.com'

            - 'issue.net'

rules.title: Phishing Detection [861fa37db1d5]
rules.content:
title: CDB SENTINEL APEX - Phishing Sender Detection [861fa37db1d5]
id: cdb-phish-861fa37db1d5
status: production
description: Detects emails from known malicious senders
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX v51
date: 2026-04-28
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
    - attack.t1566
logsource:
    category: email
    product: any
detection:
    selection:
        SenderAddress:
            - 'soc_team@company.com'
            - 'E911Support@intrado.com'
            - 'CybersecurityReports@nsa.gov'
            - 'DC3.DCISE@us.af.mil'
            - 'DC3.Information@us.af.mil'
            - 'DIB_Defense@cyber.nsa.gov'
            - 'MediaRelations@nsa.gov'
            - 'cert-fr@ssi.gouv.fr'
            - 'cert.incident@nukib.gov.cz'
            - 'contact@cisa.dhs.gov'
            - 'contact@cyber.gc.ca'
            - 'cyber.int@skw.gov.pl'
            - 'bmccann@accuvant.com'
            - 'smilingraccoon@gmail.com'
            - 'bivash@cyberdudebivash.com'
            - 'security@milesight.com'
            - 'report@cisa.gov'
            - 'support@simple-help.com'
            - 'bcoles@gmail.com'
            - 'theLightCosine@metasploit.com'
            - 'chocapikk@leakix.net'
    condition: selection
level: high
falsepositives:
    - Spoofed sender addresses
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
